prompt_text: web analytics tools with native WordPress integration
response:
# Web Analytics Tools with Native WordPress Integration

## Top Recommendations

### **1. MonsterInsights** (Best Overall)
- **Native WP Plugin**: Yes, comprehensive
- **Features**:
  - Google Analytics 4 integration
  - E-commerce tracking
  - Form analytics
  - Real-time reporting dashboard
  - User engagement insights
- **Pricing**: Free → $99.99/year (Pro)
- **Best for**: Beginners to intermediate users

### **2. Google Analytics Dashboard for WP**
- **Cost**: Free
- **Features**:
  - Real-time visitor data
  - Traffic sources, goals, conversions
  - Minimal setup required
  - Multiple dashboard widgets
- **Best for**: Budget-conscious site owners

### **3. Jetpack**
- **Native Integration**: Yes (all-in-one suite)
- **Analytics Features**:
  - Traffic overview
  - Device stats
  - Referrers tracking
  - Search terms
- **Pricing**: Free → $20+/month (higher tiers)
- **Best for**: Those wanting bundled features

### **4. Statcounter Analytics**
- **WP Plugin**: Available
- **Features**:
  - No data sampling
  - Heatmaps & session recordings
  - Real-time data
  - GDPR compliant
- **Pricing**: Free → $99/month
- **Best for**: Detailed behavior tracking

### **5. Clicky**
- **WordPress Plugin**: Yes
- **Features**:
  - Real-time analytics
  - Heatmaps included
  - Goal tracking
  - Low setup friction
- **Pricing**: $20/month
- **Best for**: Real-time monitoring

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Free Plan | Setup Difficulty | Best Feature |
|------|-----------|------------------|--------------|
| MonsterInsights | Limited | Very Easy | GA4 + Forms |
| Google Analytics Dashboard | Full | Easy | Real-time Widget |
| Jetpack | Yes | Easy | All-in-one |
| StatcCloudIcon | Yes | Medium | Heatmaps |
| Clicky | No | Easy | Real-time |

## Implementation Tips

✅ **Quick Setup**
- Install plugin → Authenticate → Enable tracking
- Most take <5 minutes

✅ **Compatibility**
- Check WordPress version requirements
- Review privacy/GDPR compliance
- Test with your theme

✅ **Performance**
- Minimize scripts (use async loading)
- Consider server-side tracking options
- Monitor impact on page load

**Which interests you most? I can provide setup instructions for any of these.**
